message.content:
Working dir: /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service
Current branch: RECO-678-fix-require-object-params-style-copurchases (already created, base: main)
Ticket: RECO-678

## Goal
Fix `custom-rules/require-object-params` ESLint warnings in ONE target file related to "style-copurchases", then update its callers.

## Step 1 — Find the target file
Look for style-copurchases related file:
```
find src/ -path "*style-copurchase*" -name "*.ts"
```
Pick the main service or model file (not test files).

## Step 2 — Run lint on THAT file only
```
npm run lint -- --max-warnings=0 src/path/to/file.ts 2>&1
```
Note which functions have `require-object-params` warnings.

## Step 3 — Fix ONLY those functions
Change positional params to object destructuring:
```typescript
// Before
function foo(a: string, b: number): void {}
// After  
function foo({ a, b }: { a: string; b: number }): void {}
```

## Step 4 — Find and fix callers
For each modified function, grep for all call sites:
```
grep -r "functionName" src/ test/ --include="*.ts" -l
```
Update every call site to use `{ param }` syntax.

## Step 5 — Verify
```
npm run lint -- --max-warnings=0 src/path/to/file.ts
npm run type-check 2>&1 | tail -5
```
Both must be clean.

## Step 6 — Commit (specific files only, NOT .husky/pre-push)
```
git add <only changed files>
git commit -m "RECO-678: <description>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

## Step 7 — Push
```
git push -u origin RECO-678-fix-require-object-params-style-copurchases
```

## Step 8 — Create DRAFT PR (base: main)
```
gh pr create --draft --base main --title "RECO-678: <title>" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
### Ticket 🐗
JIRA task: [RECO-678](https://customink.atlassian.net/browse/RECO-678)
Design: N/A

### Changes 🍍
<what changed>

### PR Checks 🐊
- [x] I've self-reviewed my code.
- [x] I've added the necessary labels.
- [x] I've added tests for my code.
- [ ] I've updated the documentation.

### Description / Ticket Summary 🐙
Fix ESLint custom-rules/require-object-params violations.

### Screenshots / Short Videos 🐮
N/A
EOF
)"
```

## Rules
- Fix ONE file only + its callers
- No relative imports (use @modules/, @utils/ etc.)
- No comments in code
- Never touch .husky/pre-push

## Return
Branch name, PR URL, files changed.

content.text: The service file has the `require-object-params` violation at line 115. Let me read the file:
The violation is at line 115 - `bulkInsert` takes a positional `pairs` parameter. I need to wrap it in an object. Let me also check the model to see if it has violations:

content.text:
Now I understand both violations:

1. **Model** (`style-copurchase.model.ts`):
   - Line 212: `bulkInsert(pairs: {...}[])` - positional param
   - Line 282: `formatValidationErrors(errors: ValidationError[])` - positional param (private method)

2. **Service** (`style-copurchases.service.ts`):
   - Line 115: `bulkInsert(pairs: {...}[])` - positional param

Let me also find the callers:
